query:
SELECT DISTINCT o.displayName, o.openingName, o.variation,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM puzzles p WHERE p.openingName = o.openingName) as puzzleCount
FROM openings o
WHERE o.displayName LIKE '%Sicilian%' OR o.displayName LIKE '%Queen%Gambit%' OR o.openingName LIKE '%Sicilian%' OR o.openingName LIKE '%Queen%'
ORDER BY puzzleCount DESC
LIMIT 20;
